notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Kevin McGonigle doubles (17) on a line drive to left fielder José Caballero. Hao-Yu Lee scores. Kevin McGonigle to 3rd. Kevin McGonigle advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by left fielder José Caballero.
